security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://127.0.0.1:5173 http://127.0.0.1:5173; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Visualizer for Conway's Game of Life.
bundle.longDescription: An interactive desktop visualizer for Conway's Game of Life. Pick a board size, paint cells, then watch the simulation evolve with playback controls and live statistics.
